context: Tests whether the agent constructs an evidence pack pipeline following the pr-evidence-builder skill's specific scripts, parallelism requirements, fallback behavior, risk classification rules, and output structure.

checklist.name: Uses collect_pr_context.py
checklist.description: Script invokes collect_pr_context.py (not a custom ad-hoc implementation) for PR context collection

checklist.name: Uses run_verifiers.sh
checklist.description: Script invokes run_verifiers.sh (not a custom verifier runner) for running deterministic verifiers

checklist.name: Parallel execution
checklist.description: Verifiers run in parallel with context collection (e.g. backgrounded processes, & operator, or explicit parallelism noted in design)

checklist.name: 60s verifier timeout
checklist.description: 60-second per-verifier timeout is enforced (--timeout 60 flag or equivalent)

checklist.name: GitHub API retry
checklist.description: Script retries GitHub API with backoff on failure, with exactly 3 attempts before falling back

checklist.name: Local git fallback
checklist.description: On GitHub API unavailability after retries, script produces partial evidence pack from local git data (--diff flag or equivalent fallback)

checklist.name: Oversized diff blocker
checklist.description: Pipeline detects oversized diffs and surfaces a blocker message (includes the phrase 'too large' or equivalent); verifiers still run even when diff is oversized

checklist.name: Uses classify_change_risk.py
checklist.description: Script invokes classify_change_risk.py for risk classification (not ad-hoc logic)

checklist.name: Risk round-up on low confidence
checklist.description: Design document explains that low-confidence risk classification rounds UP to the next higher lane

checklist.name: Uses map_diff_hotspots.py
checklist.description: Script invokes map_diff_hotspots.py for hotspot mapping

checklist.name: Uses check_required_artifacts.py
checklist.description: Script invokes check_required_artifacts.py for artifact checking

checklist.name: Uses compose_evidence_pack.py
checklist.description: Script uses compose_evidence_pack.py to merge all intermediate outputs into the final evidence-pack.json

checklist.name: Config file paths
checklist.description: Script references .pr-review/verifiers.json for custom verifiers and .pr-review/risk-overrides.json for risk overrides

checklist.name: Schema version
checklist.description: Design document or script references evidence pack schema version 1.0
